environment.isolation: unique schema first in search_path with public extensions available

cases.name: lifecycle_upsert_delete
cases.expected: created, published, and archived source states replace the tenant-local Blog search document; delete removes it

cases.name: projected_payload
cases.expected: slug, author, tags, channels, publication timestamps, counts, and version are projected from Blog-owned tables

cases.name: full_blog_reindex
cases.expected: stale current-tenant Blog documents are replaced from source rows while another tenant remains unchanged

cases.name: targeted_missing_post_cleanup
cases.expected: targeted Blog reindex deletes an existing stale document and inserts nothing when the owner post is absent

cases.name: module_toggle_cleanup_rebuild
cases.expected: Blog module disable removes only the current tenant Blog scope and enable rebuilds it from retained owner rows

cases.name: schema_search_path
cases.expected: Blog source-table availability and unqualified projector SQL resolve through the same active PostgreSQL search_path

cases.name: event_routing
cases.expected: all Blog lifecycle events, Blog module toggles, and targeted/full Blog reindex requests are claimed; unrelated module and reindex targets are ignored

runtime_promotion_requirements: execute both Rust test targets against PostgreSQL
execute the source guardrail and its fixture target
retain migration and pg_trgm permission evidence
retain host event-delivery evidence for disable and enable toggles
retain query visibility evidence for published_only storefront search
